headline: Defence White Paper Recommends RM120 Billion 15-Year Plan
context: Malaysia first Defence White Paper since 2020 recommends RM120 billion in spending over 15 years to modernize all three services.

cards.big: Defence White Paper recommends RM120 billion over 15 years
cards.sub: Plan requires doubling defence budget from 1.1% to 2.2% of GDP by 2035

cards.big: Air Force receives RM42 billion for new fighters transport and surveillance
cards.sub: Navy allocated RM38 billion for submarines patrol vessels and helicopters

cards.big: Army receives RM28 billion for armoured vehicles artillery and communications
cards.sub: Remaining RM12 billion for cyber defence intelligence and space capabilities

cards.big: Paper acknowledges South China Sea and eastern Sabah as primary threat areas
cards.sub: Parliamentary committee approved paper but funding commitment remains uncertain

cards.big: White Paper tests whether strategic planning translates into sustained defence investment
RM120 billion 15-year defence plan. Long-term planning only works if successive governments honour the commitment.
